text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the new year, and Mejiro Dober has invited
me to participate in the Mejiro family's first shrine
visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This year's shrine visit feels so different and
exciting with the addition of your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Wouldn't you agree, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why're you asking me? There's nothing
exciting about doing the same old shrine visit
every year...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I guess. Doing annual traditions like this
together is nice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Anyway, enough of that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Red bean soup!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Red bean soup!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I see plenty of treats for sale at this year's
stalls!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you say your New Year's resolution is to
cut back on desserts?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Why, the year has only just begun! I must simply
ensure that I consume less on average throughout
the rest of the year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I-is that how it works?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They have such interesting charms nowadays. And
look what protections they offer: "Everything's
Gonna Be All Right." Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Apparently the shrine's been trying to appeal to
young people. Pics of these charms are all over
Umasta!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You sure know a lot, Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I wonder what the meaning of this one is?
"Party Luck F-R-F-R"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Pffthaha! Sorry, it sounds hilarious when you say
it, Ardan. Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Talk about free-spirited...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
They seem to be enjoying themselves quite a bit.
We can't lose out to them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What kind of competition even is this...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So, Trainer, what do you think we should do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Are you even listening to me?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Amazake! What a wonderful idea! That certainly
will help warm our hearts and bodies!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Would you like some too, Dober? There's nothing
better than a cozy shrine visit to start off the
year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Haha, never heard a shrine visit described as
"cozy" before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It looks like they're selling it over there, so let's
go get some.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all enjoy our amazake and end our shrine visit
feeling very warm and fuzzy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: A charm! They've piqued my interest too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we all get matching ones to mark the
occasion of our coming here together, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What? I don't know about that... I don't mind
getting one with you, Bright, but all three of us?
That's too embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Really? But isn't getting matching charms a
hallmark of youth? The characters in the manga
you lent me did the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's different! Oh, fine. Whatever! Let's just go
get some!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the rest of our shrine visit deciding
which charm to buy, and ultimately we choose the
one for certain victory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's a fabulous place to start. What will you be
wishing for, then?
choice_data_list: For Dober to become even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: D-don't just say it all casually like that! Geez!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...You never change, do you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Exactly the answer I expected from your
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Exactly the answer I expected from your
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Aren't you supposed to keep your wish a
secret?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If you want for something to come true fervently
enough, I don't think it matters if you tell others
about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And knowing your trainer, there won't be a
problem at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I guess that's true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let's pray for each other's success in our senior
year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. A wonderful idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all stand in a line and pray for smooth sailing
in their upcoming senior year!
